sn9.1:1.1:
1
Evaṁ me sutaṁ—​
ekaṁ samayaṁ aññataro bhikkhu kosalesu vihārati aññatarasmiṁ vanasaṇḍe. Tena kho pana samayena so bhikkhu divāvihāragato pāpake akusale vitakke vitakketi gehanissite.
sn9.1:1.2: Atha kho yā tasmiṁ vanasaṇḍe adhivatthā devatā tassa bhikkhuno anukampikā atthakāmā taṁ bhikkhuṁ saṁvejetukāmā yena so bhikkhu tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ gāthāhi ajjhabhāsi:
sn9.1:1.3:
2
"Vivekakāmosi vanaṁ paviṭṭho,
Atha te mano niccharatī bahiddhā;
Jano janasmiṁ vinayassu chandaṁ,
Tato sukhī hohisi vītarāgo.
sn9.1:1.4:
3
Aratiṁ pajahāsi sato,
Bhavāsi sataṁ taṁ sārayāmase;
Pātālarajo hi duttaro,
Mā taṁ kāmarajo avāhari.
sn9.1:1.5:
4
Sakuṇo yathā paṁsukunthito,
Vidhunaṁ pātayati sitaṁ rajaṁ;
Evaṁ bhikkhu padhānavā satimā,
Vidhunaṁ pātayati sitaṁ rajan"ti.
sn9.1:1.6:
5
Atha kho so bhikkhu tāya devatāya saṁvejito saṁvegamāpādīti.
